text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: U.S. President Trump will hold a situation room meeting on Iran with his top national security and foreign policy team this Monday to discuss the deadlock in negotiations with Iran. Iran presented the U.S. with a new deal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ending the conflict through Pakistani mediators. During discussions with Pakistani, Turkish, Egyptian, and Qatari mediators that there is still no consensus amongst Iranian officials as how to address the U.S.'s demands that they suspend their nuclear program. The new proposal entails the nuclear negotiations starting after the Strait has been reopened and the blockade lifted, with the ceasefire being extended for a long period so that both parties can find a permenant solution to the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国总统特朗普将于本周一与他的高级国家安全和外交政策团队在战情室举行会议，讨论与伊朗谈判陷入僵局的问题。伊朗通过巴基斯坦调解人向美国提出了一项关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并结束冲突的新协议。在与巴基斯坦、土耳其、埃及和卡塔尔调解人的讨论中，伊朗官员对于如何应对美国要求其暂停核计划的要求仍未达成共识。新提案的内容是，在海峡重新开放和封锁解除后开始核谈判，并将停火协议延长较长时间，以便双方能够找到解决冲突的永久方案。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. SOUTHCOM says Joint Task Force Southern Spear carried out a lethal strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific transiting narcotics routes, killing three alleged traffickers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部表示，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋的毒品走私路线上对一艘船只进行了致命打击，击毙了三名涉嫌贩毒的人员。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor U.S. consumer sentiment fell to a record low in April, hitting 49.8, according to Reuters, as households remain focused on inflation fallout despite the Iran ceasefire. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048570901130576130/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 据路透社报道，4月份美国消费者信心指数跌至49.8的历史低点，尽管伊朗实现了停火，但家庭仍关注通胀带来的影响。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048570901130576130/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WaPo: The Trump administration reportedly provided a lower level of security for the White House Correspondents’ Dinner than for other events involving senior officials. The event was not designated a National Special Security Event, a status that would normally place the Secret Service in charge of coordinating enhanced protection for major gatherings of senior leaders. Officials said the concentration of leadership in one venue created unusual vulnerability had the attack been successful. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《华盛顿邮报》：据报道，特朗普政府为白宫记者协会晚宴提供的安保级别低于其他涉及高级官员的活动。该活动未被指定为“国家特别安全事件”，而这一地位通常会使特勤局负责协调针对高级领导人大型聚会的加强保护措施。官员们表示，领导人集中在一个场所，如果袭击成功，将造成不同寻常的脆弱性。@wfwitness

text: From today's stream! Larry Johnson breaks down the security failures at last night's assassination attempt Larry checked with his Secret Service colleague - the same guy who took over Reagan's detail and had to secure THIS SAME HOTEL after Hinckley. Here's how it's SUPPOSED to work: 🔸 Perimeter around the hotel - nobody walks in off the street 🔸 Secure all entrances including delivery areas 🔸 Metal detectors + minimum 2 armed officers ready to shoot if someone rushes through What actually happened: 🔸 Guy was a hotel guest, came down an elevator carrying a shotgun should have been someone at that checkpoint. 🔸 Rushed through the next checkpoint, didn't get shot "because there was nobody there ready to shoot him." Then HE starts shooting. 🔸 After it's over, Secret Service pulls guns and appears to fire at him - "yet when he is down on the ground, you don't see a single bullet hole in him." FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 来自今天的直播！拉里·约翰逊分析了昨晚暗杀企图中的安保失误。拉里咨询了他的特勤局同事——那个曾接手里根安保工作，并在欣克利事件后负责保护“同一家酒店”的人。以下是“应该”的工作流程：🔸 酒店周边设置警戒线——禁止外人随意进入 🔸 确保所有入口（包括送货区）的安全 🔸 金属探测器 + 至少2名武装人员，准备在有人冲入时开火。实际发生的情况：🔸 那个人是酒店住客，带着一把霰弹枪从电梯下来，检查站本应有人值守。🔸 冲过了下一个检查站，没有被击中，“因为那里没有人准备开火”。然后他开始射击。🔸 事后，特勤局拔枪并似乎向他开火——“然而当他倒在地上时，你却看不到他身上有一个弹孔。”完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Norah O'Donnell: In his manifesto, he wrote that 'I'm no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes.' What's your reaction? U.S. President Donald Trump: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody. I'm not a pedophile. Excuse me. You read that crap from a sick person. I was totally exonerated. You should be ashamed of yourself, reading that. You're a disgrace." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 诺拉·奥唐奈：他在宣言中写道：“我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行玷污我的双手。”你对此有何反应？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我一直在等你读这段话，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是可怕的人。我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。请原谅。你读的是一个病态的人写的垃圾。我完全被免罪了。你应该为你读这些感到羞耻。你真是丢脸。”推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Colombia’s Environment Minister says the country is leading the way on transitioning away from fossil fuels and "listening to the science," however "the stress of the fiscal and the external debt is huge, but we have to continue working on that." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048562275720589391/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息——哥伦比亚环境部长表示，该国正在引领向化石燃料转型的道路，并“听取科学意见”，但“财政和外债的压力巨大，但我们必须继续为此努力。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048562275720589391/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : U.S. President Donald J. Trump has released a security camera video showing Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the suspected shooter at tonight’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner, attempting to run past law enforcement and U.S. Secret Service Agents. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普发布了一段监控视频，显示今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的嫌疑枪手、31岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦试图冲过执法人员和美国特勤局特工。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump attacks 60 Minutes and CBS News correspondent Norah O'Donnell during today’s interview, calling them a “disgrace,” after he was read a quote from the manifesto of Cole Thomas Allen, the shooter in last night’s attempted attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington. Interviewer: “The so-called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, Mr. President. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, ‘Administration officials, they are targets.’ And he also wrote this, ‘I am no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes.’ What's your reaction to that?” President Trump: “Well, I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. Horrible people. Yeah, he did write that. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody. I'm not a pedophile.” Interviewer: “Do you think he was referring to you?” President Trump: “Excuse me. I'm not a pedophile. You read that crap from some sick person. I got associated with stuff that has nothing to do with me. I was totally exonerated. Your friends on the other side of the plate are the ones that were involved with, let's say, Epstein or other things. But I said to myself, you know, I'll do this interview and they'll probably... I read the manifesto. You know, he's a sick person. But... You should be ashamed of yourself reading that because I'm not any of those things. You're a disgrace. But go ahead. Let's finish the interview. You're disgraceful.” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在今天的采访中抨击了《60分钟》和哥伦比亚广播公司新闻记者诺拉·奥唐奈，称他们是“耻辱”，此前他被宣读了科尔·托马斯·艾伦的宣言中的一段话，此人是昨晚针对华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴袭击未遂事件的枪手。采访者：“所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊，总统先生。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写了这段话，‘政府官员，他们是目标。’他还写道，‘我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行玷污我的双手。’你对此有何反应？”特朗普总统：“嗯，我一直在等你读这段话，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是可怕的人。可怕的人。是的，他确实写了。我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。”采访者：“你认为他指的是你吗？”特朗普总统：“请原谅。我不是恋童癖。你读的是某个病态的人写的垃圾。我被卷入了一些与我无关的事情。我完全被免罪了。你们在另一边的朋友才是那些参与了，比如说，爱泼斯坦或其他事情的人。但我对自己说，你知道，我会接受这次采访，他们可能会……我读了那份宣言。你知道，他是个病态的人。但是……你应该为你读这些感到羞耻，因为我不是那些东西中的任何一个。你真是丢脸。但继续吧。让我们完成采访。你真是丢人。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump fired back at the accusation that he is a pedophile and rapist. Reporter: "The so called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, mister president. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, administration officials…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on political violence in the U.S.: "You know, you go back twenty years, forty years, a hundred years, two hundred years, five hundred years, it's always been there. People are assassinated. People are injured. People are hurt. And I'm not sure that there's any more now than there was. I do think that the hate speech of the Democrats, much more so, is very dangerous. I really think it's very dangerous to the country." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普反驳了关于他是恋童癖和强奸犯的指控。记者：‘总统先生，所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写道，行政官员……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及美国政治暴力：“你知道，回溯二十年、四十年、一百年、两百年、五百年，这种情况一直存在。有人被暗杀。有人受伤。有人受到伤害。我不确定现在的情况是否比过去更严重。我确实认为民主党的仇恨言论要危险得多。我真的认为这对国家来说非常危险。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump on how the shooter managed to get through security: Reporter: "You can see the gunman running through the metal detectors, and he fired off one or two rounds. His speed was rather incredible. Actually, it was it was like a blur.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump fired back at the accusation that he is a pedophile and rapist. Reporter: "The so called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, mister president. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, administration officials, they are targets. And he also wrote this, I'm no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes. What's your reaction to..." Trump: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're you're you're horrible people, Horrible people. Yeah. He did write that. I'm I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody." Reporter: "Oh, you think he was referring to you?" Trump: "Excuse me. I'm not a pedophile. You read that crap from some sick person. I got associated with all stuff that has nothing to do with me. I was totally exonerated. Your friends on the other side of the plate are the ones that were involved with, let's say, Epstein or other things." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普谈及枪手如何通过安检：记者：‘你可以看到枪手跑过金属探测器，他开了两枪。他的速度快得惊人。实际上，就像一道残影……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普反驳了关于他是恋童癖和强奸犯的指控。记者：‘总统先生，所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写道，行政官员，他们是目标。他还写道，我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行弄脏我的手。你对此有何反应……’” 特朗普：“我一直在等你读那段，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是……你们是……你们是可怕的人，可怕的人。是的，他确实写了。我……我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。” 记者：“哦，你认为他指的是你吗？” 特朗普：“对不起。我不是恋童癖。你读的是某个病态的人写的垃圾。我被卷入了一些与我无关的事情。我完全被平反了。你们在餐桌另一边的朋友才是那些与爱泼斯坦或其他事情有关的人。” @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Great social skills at work here. Norah O'Donnell: He had a lot of anti-Christian rhetoric. He was part of a group called the Wide Awake. He had attended a No Kings protest in California. Trump: I'm not a king. If I was a king, I wouldn't be dealing with you. https://twitter.com/BlueGeorgia/status/2048545153221099820/video/1 - Blue Georgia tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这里展现了伟大的社交技巧。诺拉·奥唐奈（Norah O'Donnell）：他有很多反基督教的言论。他是“保持清醒”（Wide Awake）组织的一员。他参加了加利福尼亚州的“不要国王”（No Kings）抗议活动。特朗普：我不是国王。如果我是国王，我就不会在这里应付你们了。 https://twitter.com/BlueGeorgia/status/2048545153221099820/video/1 - Blue Georgia 推文

text: WarMonitor Awkward. TRUMP: I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody O'DONNELL: Oh, you think he was referring to you? https://x.com/atrupar/status/2048542347869192532/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 尴尬。特朗普：我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。奥唐奈：哦……你认为他指的是你吗？ https://x.com/atrupar/status/2048542347869192532/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Central Command, the U.S. blockade of vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports has redirected or directed to turn back a total of 38 vessels. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048554057564876974/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国中央司令部发布的消息，美国对往返伊朗港口的船只实施的封锁已导致总计38艘船只改道或被迫折返。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048554057564876974/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Sailor watches a commercial ship as U.S. forces continue to enforce a blockade against Iranian ports, preventing ships from entering or exiting. American forces have directed 38 ships to turn around, or return to port. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 一名美国水手正在监视一艘商船，美军继续对伊朗港口实施封锁，阻止船只进出。美军已指示38艘船只掉头或返回港口。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump asks why all the "anti-Trump and anti-Christian rhetoric" in the manifesto is not being read out, and comments on the shooter attending No Kings protest: "The reason you have people like that is you have people doing No Kings, I'm not a king... if I was a king, I wouldn't be dealing with you." tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普质问为什么宣言中所有“反特朗普和反基督教的言论”没有被读出来，并评论了枪手参加“不要国王”抗议活动一事：“你之所以有这样的人，是因为有人在搞‘不要国王’，我不是国王……如果我是国王，我就不会在这里应付你们了。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump on the WHCD shooter's manifesto: Reporter: "Mr. President, do you know if you were the target of the gunman?" Trump: "I don't know. It sounded to me. I read a manifesto. He's radicalized. He was a Christian believer, and then he…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on how the shooter managed to get through security: Reporter: "You can see the gunman running through the metal detectors, and he fired off one or two rounds. His speed was rather incredible. Actually, it was it was like a blur. How did he get that close with the place swarming with security?" Trump: "I will say, look, I I say it because I'm a big fan of the people of law enforcement. And, you know, some of these people, they may be crazy, but they're not stupid and they figure things out. He ran 45 yards, they say, and he just went to it, and then boom, he popped through it. I mean, he ran like, I think the NFL should sign him up. He was fast." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普谈及白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）枪手的宣言：记者：‘总统先生，你知道你是否是枪手的目标吗？’ 特朗普：‘我不知道。听起来是这样。我读了宣言。他被激进化了。他曾是一名基督徒，然后他……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及枪手如何通过安检：记者：‘你可以看到枪手跑过金属探测器，他开了两枪。他的速度快得惊人。实际上，就像一道残影。在安保人员密布的情况下，他是怎么靠得那么近的？’ 特朗普：‘我会说，看，我之所以这么说是因为我是执法人员的忠实粉丝。而且，你知道，这些人中有些人可能很疯狂，但他们并不笨，他们能弄清楚事情。他们说他跑了45码，他直接冲了过去，然后砰的一声，他冲破了防线。我的意思是，他跑得……我认为NFL应该签下他。他跑得很快。’” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump describes the moment U.S. Secret Service swarmed to protect him after gunshots were heard. Reporter: "You see the security moving quickly Right. Within seconds, grabbing the vice president by his coat, lifting him up, bringing him…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on the WHCD shooter's manifesto: Reporter: "Mr. President, do you know if you were the target of the gunman?" Trump: "I don't know. It sounded to me. I read a manifesto. He's radicalized. He was a Christian believer, and then he became an anti-Christian and he had a lot of change. He's been going through a lot based on what he wrote. His brother complained about him and I think reported him to the police, and his sister likewise complained about him. His family was very concerned. He was probably a pretty sick guy." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普描述了枪声响起后美国特勤局蜂拥而至保护他的时刻。记者：‘你可以看到安保人员迅速移动。没错。几秒钟内，抓住副总统的外套，把他拉起来，带他……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）枪手的宣言：记者：‘总统先生，你知道你是否是枪手的目标吗？’ 特朗普：‘我不知道。听起来是这样。我读了宣言。他被激进化了。他曾是一名基督徒，然后他变成了一个反基督徒，他经历了很多变化。根据他写的，他经历了很多。他的兄弟抱怨过他，我想还向警方举报了他，他的姐妹也同样抱怨过他。他的家人非常担心。他可能是一个病得很重的人。’” @wfwitness

text: ⭕️ Humvee vs FPV in Qantara on 24 April.
text_zh: ⭕️ 4月24日，坎塔拉（Qantara）发生的悍马车与FPV无人机对抗事件。

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump on the shooter who said in his manifesto that security was lax at the venue and called secret service incompetent: "Well, he was pretty incompetent, too, because he got caught, and he got caught pretty easily." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048549675486023877/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普谈及枪手，该枪手在宣言中称现场安保松懈并称特勤局无能：“嗯，他自己也相当无能，因为他被抓住了，而且被抓得很轻松。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048549675486023877/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump on WHCA gunman: "I read a manifesto. He's radicalized. He was a Christian, a believer, and then he became an anti-Christian. He was probably a pretty sick guy." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048548614721446080/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及白宫记者协会（WHCA）枪手：“我读了宣言。他被激进化了。他曾是一名基督徒，一名信徒，然后他变成了一个反基督徒。他可能是一个病得很重的人。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048548614721446080/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "I'm a big fan of the people of law enforcement... he was fast. When you look at it on tape, it's almost like a blur. But it was amazing because as soon as they saw that, you could see them draw their guns. They were so professional." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048548060892926323/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我是执法人员的忠实粉丝……他跑得很快。当你从录像中看时，几乎就像一道残影。但这很神奇，因为他们一看到那个，你就能看到他们拔出了枪。他们非常专业。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048548060892926323/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump calls out 60 minutes for highlighting a line from the manifesto: "I'm not a rapist, I didn't rape anybody... I'm not a pedophile, you read that crap from some sick person. I got associated with all stuff that has nothing to do with me... you should be ashamed of yourself reading that because I'm not any of those things." tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普指责《60分钟》节目强调宣言中的一行字：“我不是强奸犯，我没有强奸任何人……我不是恋童癖，你读的是某个病态的人写的垃圾。我被卷入了一些与我无关的事情……你应该为你读出那些话感到羞耻，因为我根本不是那些东西。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump on whether he was worried about injuries at WHCD shooting: "I wasn't worried, I understand life, we live in a crazy world." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048545135168823434/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普谈及他是否担心白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）枪击事件中的伤亡：“我不担心，我了解生活，我们生活在一个疯狂的世界里。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048545135168823434/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump describes the moment U.S. Secret Service swarmed to protect him after gunshots were heard. Reporter: "You see the security moving quickly Right. Within seconds, grabbing the vice president by his coat, lifting him up, bringing him out. Then the counter assault comes in, took ten seconds for them to flank you, mister president, and then twenty seconds to get you out. It looked chaotic. At one point, you were down. What was happening?" Trump: "Well, what happened is it was a little bit me. I wanted to see what was happening, and I wasn't making it that easy for him. I wanted to see what was going on. And by that time, we started to realize maybe it was a bad problem, different kind of a problem, bad one, and different than what would be normal noise from a ballroom, which you hear all the time. And I was surrounded by great people, and I probably made them act a little bit more slowly. I said, wait a minute. Wait a minute. Let me see. Wait a minute." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普描述了枪声响起后美国特勤局蜂拥而至保护他的时刻。记者：‘你可以看到安保人员迅速移动。没错。几秒钟内，抓住副总统的外套，把他拉起来，带他出去。然后反突击小组赶到，总统先生，他们用了十秒钟侧翼包抄你，然后用了二十秒把你带出去。看起来很混乱。有那么一刻，你倒下了。发生了什么？’ 特朗普：‘嗯，发生的事情是，有一点是因为我。我想看看发生了什么，我并没有让他那么容易（带我走）。我想看看发生了什么。到那时，我们开始意识到这可能是一个严重的问题，一种不同类型的问题，一个糟糕的问题，与宴会厅里通常听到的那种噪音不同。我被很棒的人包围着，我可能让他们行动得慢了一点。我说，等一下。等一下。让我看看。等一下。’” @wfwitness

text: Finnish President Stubb: In the past four months — and sorry for being morbid — Ukraine has killed or wounded between 30 to 35,000 Russian soldiers per month. They have done so 95% with drones, at a ratio of one Ukrainian dead to five Russians dead.
text_zh: 芬兰总统斯图布：在过去的四个月里——抱歉我这么说有些病态——乌克兰每月杀伤3万到3.5万名俄罗斯士兵。他们95%是通过无人机做到的，乌克兰人与俄罗斯人的死亡比例为1比5。

text: Finnish President Stubb: I think we Europeans have to understand that we need Ukraine more than Ukraine needs us. I think the tide has actually turned.
text_zh: 芬兰总统斯图布：我认为我们欧洲人必须明白，我们需要乌克兰的程度超过乌克兰需要我们的程度。我认为局势实际上已经扭转了。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump on the shooters manifesto: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody..." Norah O'Donnell: "Oh... you think he was referring to you?" Damn... cooked! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普谈及枪手的宣言：“我一直在等你读那段，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是可怕的人。我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人……” 诺拉·奥唐奈：“哦……你认为他指的是你吗？” 该死……被怼了！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump on the WHCA dinner shooter: I think the NFL should sign him up. He was fast.
text_zh: 特朗普谈白宫记者协会晚宴枪手：我认为NFL应该签下他。他跑得很快。

text: Trump: The reason you have people like that is you have people doing “no kings.” I’m not a king. If I was a king, I wouldn’t be dealing with you.
text_zh: 特朗普：之所以会出现那样的人，是因为有人在搞“没有国王”。我不是国王。如果我是国王，我就不会跟你们打交道了。

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : Scoop: Israel sent "Iron Dome" system and troops to UAE during Iran war. My story on @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/26/israel-iron-dome-uae tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid：独家：以色列在伊朗战争期间向阿联酋派遣了“铁穹”系统和部队。我在 @axios 上的报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/26/israel-iron-dome-uae 推文

text: WarMonitor The president said he didn't fall while being escorted out by Secret Service. What do you think? https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048537750102499511/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 总统说他在特勤局护送下撤离时并没有摔倒。你怎么看？https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048537750102499511/video/1 推文

text: Trump: I am not a rapist. I didn’t rape anybody. I am not a pedophile.
text_zh: 特朗普：我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。

text: Q: It looks like you go down. Trump: They said, “Please go down on the floor,” so I went down.
text_zh: 问：看起来你倒下了。特朗普：他们说，“请趴到地板上”，所以我就趴下了。

text: Q: Was the First Lady scared? Trump: I don’t want to say, and people don’t like having it said that they were scared, but who wouldn’t be when you have a situation like that?
text_zh: 问：第一夫人害怕吗？特朗普：我不想说，人们不喜欢被说成是害怕，但遇到那样的情况，谁会不害怕呢？

text: Q: How worried were you that there were going to be injuries? Trump: I wasn’t worried. I understand life—we live in a crazy world.
text_zh: 问：你有多担心会有人受伤？特朗普：我不担心。我了解生活——我们生活在一个疯狂的世界里。

text: Q: Do you know if you were the target of the gunman? Trump: I don’t know... I read a manifesto. He’s radicalized. He was a Christian believer, and then he became an anti-Christian, and he had a lot of change.
text_zh: 问：你知道你是否是枪手的目标吗？特朗普：我不知道……我读了一份宣言。他被激进化了。他曾是一名基督徒，后来变成了反基督者，他经历了很多变化。

text: The White House Correspondents’ Dinner was held with a lower level of security than typically used for events attended by top U.S. leaders, even though Trump, JD Vance, and several Cabinet members were present. The event at the Washington Hilton was not designated a National Special Security Event, meaning full federal security coordination was not in place. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 尽管特朗普、万斯和几位内阁成员出席了白宫记者协会晚宴，但该活动的安保级别低于美国高层领导人出席活动时通常使用的级别。在华盛顿希尔顿酒店举行的此次活动并未被指定为国家特别安全活动，这意味着没有进行全面的联邦安全协调。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: Trump said he delayed Secret Service evacuation during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting because he “wanted to see what was going on,”
text_zh: 特朗普表示，他在白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件中推迟了特勤局的撤离，因为他“想看看发生了什么”，

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says "he wanted to seem what was happening," that's why it took so long to evacuate him. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普说“他想看看发生了什么”，这就是为什么撤离他花了那么长时间。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender Speaking today on 60 Minutes, President Donald J. Trump said that he “wasn’t making it that easy” for and likely slowed down the Secret Service as they tried to evacuate him during last night’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington. https://x.com/60Minutes/status/2048511534582640943/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统今天在《60分钟》节目中表示，他“并没有让事情变得那么容易”，并且在昨晚华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴期间，当特勤局试图撤离他时，他可能拖慢了他们的速度。 https://x.com/60Minutes/status/2048511534582640943/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Earlier, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre reported an incident 6nm northeast of Garacad, Somalia, where “unauthorized persons” took control of a cargo vessel which was subsequently redirected into territorial waters. Per the release, the activity is likely from a pirate action group or PAG. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 早些时候，英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称，在索马里加拉卡德东北6海里处发生了一起事件，“未经授权的人员”控制了一艘货船，随后该船被改道驶入领海。根据发布的消息，该活动很可能来自海盗行动小组（PAG）。推文

text: From today's stream! Larry Johnson drops a BOMBSHELL The Air Force and Navy commanders under CENTCOM have both told leadership that we should not restart this thing. Our best option is to get out and get out now. This has gone up to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs. Larry: "If that holds up, we're essentially looking at the end of the war. They'll figure out a political exit. If Trump overrules them and orders them to attack - it's gonna be devastating for the US and for Israel." The military is telling the president to stop. FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 来自今天的直播！拉里·约翰逊投下了一枚重磅炸弹：中央司令部（CENTCOM）下属的空军和海军指挥官都告诉领导层，我们不应该重启这件事。我们最好的选择是撤出，而且要立即撤出。此事已上报至参谋长联席会议主席。拉里：“如果情况属实，我们基本上是在目睹战争的终结。他们会想出一个政治退出方案。如果特朗普否决他们并下令发动攻击，这对美国和以色列来说将是毁灭性的。”军方正在告诉总统停止行动。完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 🤡 🇺🇸 I ranian FM Araghchi officially concluded his visit to Oman, Iran's Strait of Hormuz neighbor. He's off to the next leg of his international tour - Moscow. 🐻 Truth Social meltdown in 5, 4, 3... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 🤡 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐正式结束了对伊朗霍尔木兹海峡邻国阿曼的访问。他即将前往国际巡访的下一站——莫斯科。🐻 Truth Social 平台将在 5、4、3……秒内崩溃。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @NathalieTocci : Out now! Europe is facing real threats, and real choices. I was delighted to coproduce “Why Europe Matters”, a documentary that brings together voices from across the continent to make the case for a stronger, more united Europe. Watch the full film here https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=qwceYXqUVzA tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @NathalieTocci：现已发布！欧洲正面临真正的威胁和真正的选择。我很高兴能联合制作纪录片《为何欧洲至关重要》（Why Europe Matters），这部纪录片汇集了来自欧洲各地的声音，旨在为一个更强大、更团结的欧洲进行辩护。点击此处观看完整影片 https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=qwceYXqUVzA 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇸🇴/🇺🇸🇮🇱Somalia may restrict access to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait for countries that undermine the country’s territorial integrity, its ambassador to Ethiopia and permanent representative to the African Union, Abdullahi Warfa, said on X. "Any country interfering…" 🇸🇴 🌟 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Seizure of a cargo vessel off the Somali coast ➡️ The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported early this morning that a maritime hijacking incident has occurred 6 nautical miles northeast of the port of Garacad, Somalia. ➡️ According to the alert, unidentified armed individuals have seized control of a cargo vessel and diverted it toward Somali territorial waters. ➡️ No further details have yet been released regarding the crew, cargo, or nationality of the hijacked vessel, and investigations by the relevant authorities are ongoing. 🐻 Since the Somali federal government hasn't spoken on this, this is clearly an independent action by Puntland — one of Somalia's semi-autonomous federal member states. Unlike Isreali/USA-backed Somaliland , they are not separatists — they formally acknowledge the federal government, but operate in practice as an autonomous region with their own president, police and military. Garacad has been the center of Somali piracy since the early 2000s. To repeat what we wrote 2 weeks ago — Yemenis are just sitting on the shore and watching the world burn. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇸🇴/🇺🇸🇮🇱索马里驻埃塞俄比亚大使兼驻非盟常驻代表阿卜杜拉希·瓦法（Abdullahi Warfa）在 X 上表示，索马里可能会限制那些破坏该国领土完整的国家进入曼德海峡。‘任何干涉的国家……’” 🇸🇴 🌟 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 索马里海岸一艘货船被劫持 ➡️ 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）今天清晨报告称，在索马里加拉卡德（Garacad）港东北 6 海里处发生了一起海上劫持事件。➡️ 根据警报，身份不明的武装人员已控制了一艘货船，并将其转向索马里领海。➡️ 目前尚未发布有关被劫持船只的船员、货物或国籍的进一步细节，相关部门的调查正在进行中。🐻 由于索马里联邦政府尚未就此事发表评论，这显然是邦特兰（Puntland）——索马里半自治联邦成员州之一——的独立行动。与以色列/美国支持的索马里兰不同，他们不是分裂主义者——他们正式承认联邦政府，但在实践中作为拥有自己的总统、警察和军队的自治地区运作。自 21 世纪初以来，加拉卡德一直是索马里海盗活动的中心。重申我们两周前写的内容——也门人只是坐在岸边看着世界燃烧。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices rise by over 2% in early trading. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 油价在早盘交易中上涨超过 2%。推文

text: WarMonitor Reports out of Tehran say Iran is floating a new proposal: A permanent ceasefire across all fronts, including Lebanon, comes first. Then talks on Hormuz. Only after that, negotiations on uranium enrichment. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 来自德黑兰的报道称，伊朗正在提出一项新提案：首先在包括黎巴嫩在内的所有战线实现永久停火。然后讨论霍尔木兹海峡问题。只有在此之后，才进行关于铀浓缩的谈判。推文

text: Open Source Intel Former U.S. President Barack Obama: "Although we don’t yet have the details about the motives behind last night's shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, it’s incumbent upon all us to reject the idea that violence has any place in our democracy. It’s also a sobering reminder of the courage and sacrifice that U.S. Secret Service Agents show every day. I’m grateful to them – and thankful that the agent who was shot is going to be okay." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国前总统巴拉克·奥巴马：“虽然我们尚不清楚昨晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件背后的动机，但我们所有人都有责任拒绝暴力在我们的民主中占有一席之地的想法。这也清醒地提醒我们，美国特勤局特工每天所表现出的勇气和牺牲。我感谢他们——并庆幸那位中枪的特工会没事的。” 推文
